figure4.basis: RBF RVM with all 506 covariates as centers (d=n), no embedded bias, fixed scalar lengthscale

verification_rule: Real-data gates, converged Huber fits, both robust-baseline noninferiority checks at a predeclared 0.5 RMSE margin, homoscedastic superiority at >=10% contamination, mechanism controls, and both Figure-3 categorical high-sparsity/low-contamination patterns must all pass.
falsification_rule: The paper does not quantify over all seeds or fixed scalar lengthscales, so divergence under the declared implementation is BLOCKED rather than a universal falsification.
